evidence: "I am an avid British mystery fan and if wishes come true....I am ready for Endeavor Season 3!"
"The old musicals are my all time favorites!"

"This is one of my all time favorite films."

brand_loyalty.value: high for specific actors and series
evidence: "I watch all of David Tennant's accomplishments with great delight."
"I love that the show is filmed in various countries, and that I get to see such beautiful and unique cars."
"The setting is deliciously exotic and beautiful and as always Maggie Smith and Judi Dench are perfection."
"I loved this film as a child. A film the whole family can watch together and laugh all the way through!"
"I cried when Morse truly was no longer with us."
"This is one of my all time favorite films. I share it with friends, I watch it when I feel down, I watch it when I feel good."

summary: The user has a strong preference for British mysteries and dramas, often enjoying character-driven narratives with emotional depth. They appreciate high production quality and have a fondness for specific actors, indicating a loyalty to familiar series and genres.
